A_futures_stocks_5min.name: Prop Desk AMD+PBD Intraday
A_futures_stocks_5min.description: 5-minute intraday scalp on futures and stocks using AMD liquidity sweeps + FVG entries

session_filter.note: No trades outside these windows — low-liquidity AMD setups fail in dead zones

long: Price is at or below Weekly Value Area Low (VAL) — PBD discount zone
B-shape forming: prior impulse down, tight bottom balance forming
Liquidity sweep: wick below accumulation low, candle closes back above it
Bullish FVG forms on displacement candle (3-bar gap up)
Fast EMA (9) is above Slow EMA (21)
short: Price is at or above Weekly Value Area High (VAH) — PBD premium zone
P-shape forming: prior impulse up, tight top balance forming
Liquidity sweep: wick above accumulation high, candle closes back below it
Bearish FVG forms on displacement candle (3-bar gap down)
Fast EMA (9) is below Slow EMA (21)

exit_rules: Stop loss: just beyond the manipulation wick (lowest low of 3 bars for longs, highest high for shorts)
No partial exits — take full target or stop
If 2 consecutive losses in a session: stop trading for the day
risk_rules: No trades in first 15 minutes after open (9:30-9:45 ET)
No trades after 3:45 PM ET (avoid close slippage)

B_options_3week.name: Options Directional 3-Week
B_options_3week.description: Use AMD+PBD signals on the DAILY chart to pick directional options with 21 DTE

call_buy: Daily chart AMD long signal fires (bullSweep + bullTrend + hasBullFvg + volExpanded)
Price at or near Weekly VAL — discount zone
IV Rank below 30: buy ATM call outright
IV Rank 30-50: buy debit call spread (buy ATM, sell +2 strikes OTM)
IV Rank above 50: sell OTM put spread in same direction instead
put_buy: Daily chart AMD short signal fires (bearSweep + bearTrend + hasBearFvg + volExpanded)
Price at or near Weekly VAH — premium zone
IV Rank below 30: buy ATM put outright
IV Rank 30-50: buy debit put spread (buy ATM, sell -2 strikes OTM)
IV Rank above 50: sell OTM call spread in same direction instead

exit_rules: Primary exit: 50% profit on the option premium (e.g., paid $1.00, sell at $1.50)
Secondary exit: AMD signal invalidated — price closes back through accumulation zone
Hard stop: option loses 30% of entry premium
Time stop: exit any open option position at 7 DTE (14 days held) regardless of P&L
Never hold options through earnings unless specifically an earnings play

iv_rank_guide.30_to_50: Use debit spreads — reduce premium exposure
iv_rank_guide.above_50: Sell credit spreads in trade direction — collect premium instead

risk_rules: Max 2% account risk per options trade (options can go to zero, so smaller size)
Max 3 open options positions at once
No buying options when IV Rank > 70 — premium too expensive
No trades the day before major economic events (Fed, CPI, NFP)

bullish: Fast EMA (9) is above Slow EMA (21) on the relevant timeframe
Price is at or below Weekly Value Area Low — discount zone or VAL bounce
B-shape pattern forming (bottom balance after impulse down)
Bullish AMD: liquidity sweep below accumulation + close back inside + bull FVG
bearish: Fast EMA (9) is below Slow EMA (21) on the relevant timeframe
Price is at or above Weekly Value Area High — premium zone or VAH rejection
P-shape pattern forming (top balance after impulse up)
Bearish AMD: liquidity sweep above accumulation + close back inside + bear FVG
neutral: EMA 9 and 21 are intertwined or flat
Price is in the middle of the weekly value area (between VAL and VAH)
No clear accumulation box forming — price ranging freely
Volume is at or below the 20-bar average

notes: Two-strategy system. Strategy A (5-min) for futures and stocks, strict session filter 9:30-11:30 and 14:00-16:00 ET. Strategy B (daily) for options with 21 DTE. Both use AMD+PBD framework with EMA trend filter and volume expansion confirmation. Pine script v2 fixes accumulation reset bug and adds session gating.
